title: Contrast with but and although
subtitle: Add a different side to your idea.
overview: Add a different side to your idea.
A2 Bridge turns short A1 sentences into connected, useful English. Read aloud, understand the Chinese, then make your own sentence.

sections.title: A2 bridge focus
rows: I was tired, but I still studied.
Although it was raining, I went out.
虽然下雨了，我还是出门了。
Yes, I was tired, but I still studied.
学了，我很累，但还是学习了。

items.en: I was tired, but I still studied.
Although it was raining, I went out.
items.zh: 虽然下雨了，我还是出门了。

items.en: Yes, I was tired, but I still studied.
items.zh: 学了，我很累，但还是学习了。

items.en: This sentence helps me speak a little longer.
items.zh: 这个句子帮助我说得稍微长一点。

items.en: I can change the details and make it true for my life.
items.zh: 我可以改变细节，让它符合我的真实生活。

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: Yes, I was tired, but I still studied.
lines.zh: 学了，我很累，但还是学习了。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Can you add one more detail?

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: Although it was raining, I went out.
lines.zh: 虽然下雨了，我还是出门了。

items.en: I was tired, but I still studied.
Although it was raining, I went out.
items.zh: 虽然下雨了，我还是出门了。

items.en: Now say the same idea with your own real details.
items.zh: 现在用你自己的真实细节说同一个意思。

items.en: Repeat it until it feels clear and natural.
items.zh: 重复它，直到感觉清楚又自然。
